race.comment: OAKFIELD NEPTUNE (10) is resuming from a break. Placed in a recent trial at Beaumont (Newcastle) to continue her good work in preparation for this. Opened last campaign with a win at this track over 1200m. Big chance. PESCHIERA (6) last appeared 23 weeks ago. Doesn't win out of turn but generally comes to hand quickly and has placed at four of seven runs over this distance. Can feature. LETHAL LOVE (3) is resuming from a lay-off. Placed in a recent trial at Rosehill. Opened last campaign with a fourth at Canberra over 1000m. Definite thrteat fresh. FORCEFILLY (16) hasn't been too far away since resuming, the latest effort a fourth over 1200m at Kembla Grange two weeks ago. Had excuses on that occasion and can give this a shake.
